name: applyThemeSchema
description: Applies theme variables (primary, muted, etc.) from the theme schema configuration to the document's root style (CSS variables).
usage_guidelines: Used internally when switching the theme mode (light/dark) or theme schema (color).
Uses predefined preset colors and assigns them to CSS properties.

params.name: presetThemeSchemaConfig
params.description: The configuration mapping theme names and modes to color variables.

return_value.description: Does not return anything; mutates document root style.

Do: Call this utility when integrating a custom theme engine.
Dont: Avoid calling directly from components unless implementing custom theme controls.
